title: Data Structures and Algorithms
description: Core subject covering arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, sorting and searching algorithms.

title: Operating Systems
description: Study of process management, CPU scheduling, memory management, deadlocks, file systems and I/O.

title: Database Management Systems
description: Concepts of databases including ER model, relational model, SQL, normalization, transactions and recovery.

title: Computer Networks
description: Networking fundamentals including OSI model, TCP/IP, routing, transport layer and network security.

title: Object Oriented Programming
description: Object-oriented concepts such as classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction and exception handling.

title: Software Engineering
description: Software development life cycle, requirement analysis, design, testing, maintenance and project management.

title: Computer Organization and Architecture
description: Internal structure of computer systems including CPU, memory, instruction sets, pipelining and parallelism.

title: Theory of Computation
description: Formal languages, automata theory, grammars, Turing machines and computational complexity.

title: Compiler Design
description: Design and implementation of compilers including lexical analysis, parsing, semantic analysis and code generation.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Introduction to AI concepts such as problem solving, search techniques, knowledge representation and reasoning.
